name: competitive-scan
command: senkani exec --tool senkani_search_web --args '{"query":"<competitor> pricing OR changelog OR release","limit":12}' | ollama run gemma3:9b "Extract concrete changes: pricing, product, positioning." > ~/.senkani/research/competitive/$(date +%F).md
description: Monday 08:00 competitor scan: search the web for pricing/release changes, land a weekly markdown roll-up.
